label: Factor Breakdown
description: Per-strategy P&L breakdown for the selected factor with a mini time series chart alongside.

0.7.note: Two-state: no selectedFactor → FactorSummaryTable (all factors listed); selectedFactor set → drilldown view.

1.6.note: Empty arrays → filterMultiplier=1 → full unfiltered dataset.

1.7.note: STRATEGY_AREA_COLORS inline constant (widget-local, not from mocks). formatNumber/formatPercent from lib/utils/formatters.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ paper ✓ batch ✓. Factor breakdown renders attribution data for the selected factor — meaningful in all modes.

3.2.note: pnl-data-context.tsx passes dataMode==='batch' into generateFactorTimeSeries and generateStrategyBreakdown (lines 255, 263). Mode-aware data generation confirmed.

3.3.note: N/A — display-only widget. No order entry or submission controls.

3.4.note: Human to confirm batch mode indicator is visible (expected: from waterfall controls bar; no separate indicator in this widget).

3.5.note: Paper mode: identical rendering with paper trade attribution data from context. No UI changes needed.

3.6.note: No WebSocket, setInterval, or polling in this widget or data-context. No connections to disable.

l3.notes: Agent checks (3.1, 3.2, 3.3 N/A, 3.5, 3.6) pass. 3.4 needs human visual confirmation.

4.1.note: No dead buttons. 'All Factors' back button calls setSelectedFactor(null). Table row onClick drills into factor via setSelectedFactor(c.name). No empty handlers.

4.2.note: EntityLink for strategy uses proper routing. No href='#'.

4.3.note: Human to confirm the two-state UI (summary table → drilldown) is clear and all fields are present.

4.4.note: Playwright 2026-04-21: clicking a factor row in FactorSummaryTable sets selectedFactor in PnLDataProvider; widget flips to drilldown view showing per-strategy horizontal bars + stacked Area chart. Round-trip confirmed via waterfall → drilldown selection key.

4.5.note: EntityLink type='strategy' — confirm strategy detail route exists. EntityLink component handles routing.

4.6.note: No inline entitlement checks in render path.

4.7.note: Playwright 2026-04-21: '← All Factors' button calls setSelectedFactor(null); widget returns to FactorSummaryTable without crash or stale state.

4.8.note: Playwright 2026-04-21: outer container uses flex-col min-h-0 + overflow-auto on selectedFactorData branch; FactorSummaryTable uses sticky header + flex-1 min-h-0 scroll region. Observed no overflow at default preset height.

l4.notes: Agent checks (4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6) pass. 4.4, 4.7, 4.8 agent-verified via Playwright. 4.3 human-needed for discoverability judgment.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all (widget serves as detail view for any factor selected in pnl-waterfall). Driven by selectedFactor from PnLDataProvider — strategy-agnostic. Shows per-strategy attribution for whichever factor is drilled into (Funding, Carry, Basis, Delta, Gamma, Rebates, Slippage, Fees, Theta, Vega).

7.1.note: STRATEGY_AREA_COLORS = ['#10b981','#3b82f6','#f59e0b','#ec4899','#8b5cf6'] — 5 hardcoded hex colors for multi-strategy area stacking. No multi-strategy palette token exists in globals.css. Deferred: requests --chart-3 through --chart-7 or equivalent multi-series palette tokens.

7.3.note: File 216+8 (after onKeyDown addition) = ~224 lines total. FactorSummaryTable ~93 lines, PnlFactorDrilldownWidget ~130 lines. Both within 200-line limit.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, innerHTML.

7.7.note: maxVal computed inline in map loop over selectedFactorData.breakdown — could be memoized but array is small (strategy count). No useMemo/useCallback with inline object deps.

l7.notes: 7.1 deferred (STRATEGY_AREA_COLORS needs palette tokens). 7.2-7.4, 7.6-7.7 pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: text-[10px] in FactorSummaryTable header row and hint text. fontSize: 10/11 in Recharts tick props are API props, exempt. Deferred pending --text-2xs token.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Skeleton from components/ui. EntityLink from components/trading. PnLValue from components/trading. Recharts for area chart.

8.4.note: Agent: Added role='button', tabIndex={0}, aria-label, onKeyDown (Enter/Space) to in FactorSummaryTable. No without alt. No bare . Human: keyboard-only + screen-reader pass needed.

8.5.note: Human to verify at minW=4, minH=3 the summary table and drilldown view render correctly.

l8.notes: 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.1 deferred. 8.4 agent portion fixed, human walk needed. 8.5 human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Factor drilldown is a separate scrollable view with strategy breakdown table + area chart. Merging into waterfall would overflow the waterfall widget height and obscure the structural P&L bars.

relationships.notes: Detail widget: reads selectedFactor from PnLDataProvider which is set by pnl-waterfall clicks. When no factor is selected, shows FactorSummaryTable as a useful standalone view.

dataContract.notes: Currently mock-generated in data context. Production: REST fetch triggered by selectedFactor change, returning per-strategy attribution for the selected factor.

gaps: STRATEGY_AREA_COLORS limited to 5 colors — wraps via modulo for >5 strategies, may cause color collisions
Strategy name display uses raw name strings — no registry lookup for display metadata
coverage.notes: Widget is factor-agnostic — renders whatever selectedFactorData the context provides for the selected factor. Strategy coverage depends on what strategies are in scope.

knownIssues: STRATEGY_AREA_COLORS array uses 5 hardcoded hex values — needs theme tokens (--chart-3 through --chart-7 or similar palette).

findings.fix: Replaced hardcoded hex palette with theme chart tokens: ['var(--chart-3)','var(--chart-4)','var(--chart-5)','var(--chart-6)','var(--chart-1)']. globals.css defines --chart-1..--chart-6; 5th slot reuses --chart-1 since only 4 non-primary chart tokens exist. Modulo cycling in Area map handles overflow beyond 5 strategies.

findings.description: pnl-factor-drilldown-widget.tsx — ~30 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n helper.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: pnl-factor-drilldown-widget.tsx — text-[10px] in FactorSummaryTable header and hint text.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (0.625rem/10px) using newly-added --text-micro token in globals.css.

findings.description: pnl-factor-drilldown-widget.tsx:50 — <tr onClick> in FactorSummaryTable had no role, tabIndex, aria-label, or keyboard handler.
findings.fix: Added role='button', tabIndex={0}, aria-label='Drill into {factor.name} factor', onKeyDown (Enter/Space triggers setSelectedFactor) to each clickable <tr>.

findings.description: Playwright verification of factor-row drilldown, '← All Factors' back button, and scroll containment.
findings.fix: 2026-04-21 Playwright session on /services/trading/pnl: clicking a factor row in FactorSummaryTable sets selectedFactor via PnLDataProvider and flips the widget to the drilldown view. '← All Factors' returns to summary. flex-col min-h-0 + overflow-auto contains the drilldown within widget bounds at default preset height. No console errors.
